title: Ollama is still the easiest way to start local LLMs, but it's the worst way to keep running them - XDA
Ello Clean Start - On New Jersey
summary: Host and mom Dina Deleasa Gonsar introduces Ello Clean Start, a revolutionary new line of children’s ceramic tableware from Ello designed to transform toddler mealtimes by eliminating concerns about plastics and harmful chemicals. These pieces are crafted from premium, non-porous porcelain ceramic with soft, removable silicone bumpers, ensuring a safe and worry-free eating experience for little ones.  Ello Clean Start tableware is completely free from BPA, PVC, phthalates, melamine, and PFAS “forever chemicals,” being non-toxic, odor-resistant, stain-proof, and dishwasher-safe for everyday use. You can explore the full collection and purchase the pieces on ElloProducts.com or Amazon, and follow @elloproducts for more tips and inspiration.

title: Hello Sunshine's Lauren Neustadter Previews 'Elle' & 'Lucky' TV Shows - Deadline
summary: Lauren Neustadter, President of Film & TV at Reese Witherspoon’s Hello Sunshine production company, discussed upcoming projects, including a new season of “The Last Thing He Told Me,” a sequel to “Hannah” featuring Laura Dave and Josh Singer, and a forthcoming film adaptation of Kristin Hannah’s novel “The Nightingale.”  The company is also actively developing new shows like “Elle” and “Lucky,” with plans for a limited series based on “Curtis Sittenfield’s Romantic Comedy” and “Claire Leslie Hall’s Broken Country.”  Neustadter expressed excitement about upcoming projects like “Legally Blonde” prequel “Elle” and “The Morning Show” Season 5, as well as a new film with Jennifer Garner and the upcoming movie with the romantic comedy.
